name: Should I use an SEO tool or an AI visibility tool?

mainEntity.name: Should I use an SEO tool or an AI visibility tool?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use SEO tools for broader ranking and traffic analysis, then pair them with AI visibility tools if you need citation and mention tracking across AI systems. Specialized tools are better for share of voice, sentiment, and competitor benchmarking in AI answers.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use SEO tools for search performance and AI visibility tools for mentions, citations, and share of voice.

description: Use SEO tools for search performance and AI visibility tools for mentions, citations, and share of voice.
